title: Travel & Accommodations
description: Getting to our desert home and finding a beautiful place to rest.

airports.title: Palm Springs (PSP)
airports.description: The most convenient gateway. Less than 40 minutes from the celebration.

airports.title: Los Angeles (LAX)
airports.description: More flight paths, but requires a scenic 2.5 to 3.5 hour drive depending on traffic.

hotels.title: La Quinta Resort
hotels.description: A historic desert sanctuary featuring multiple pools, gardens, and clay tennis courts.

hotels.title: JW Marriott Desert Springs
hotels.description: Sprawling lakeside resort with boat rides, palm tree trails, and local desert wildlife.

favorites.title: Local Coffee Shop
favorites.description: Our favorite local morning routine for signature cold brews and organic matchas.

favorites.title: Joshua Tree National Park
favorites.description: A breathtaking national park filled with Mojave wilderness. Best viewed at dawn.
